module_header: module TopModule ( input [3:0] a, input [3:0] b, input [3:0] c, input [3:0] d, input [3:0] e, output reg [3:0] q );
prompt:
I would like you to implement a module named TopModule with the following
interface. All input and output ports are one bit unless otherwise
specified.

 - input  a (4 bits)
 - input  b (4 bits)
 - input  c (4 bits)
 - input  d (4 bits)
 - input  e (4 bits)
 - output q (4 bits)

The module should implement a combinational circuit. Read the simulation
waveforms to determine what the circuit does, then implement it.

  time  a  b  c  d  e  q
  0ns   x  x  x  x  x  x
  5ns   x  x  x  x  x  x
  10ns  x  x  x  x  x  x
  15ns  a  b  0  d  e  b
  20ns  a  b  1  d  e  e
  25ns  a  b  2  d  e  a
  30ns  a  b  3  d  e  d
  35ns  a  b  4  d  e  f
  40ns  a  b  5  d  e  f
  45ns  a  b  6  d  e  f
  50ns  a  b  7  d  e  f
  55ns  a  b  8  d  e  f
  60ns  a  b  9  d  e  f
  65ns  a  b  a  d  e  f
  70ns  a  b  b  d  e  f
  75ns  a  b  c  d  e  f
  80ns  a  b  d  d  e  f
  85ns  a  b  e  d  e  f
  90ns  a  b  f  d  e  f
